blessed with happiness, wealth and children. And one bom in a
Mixed decanate is ill-behaved, loose in sexual matters fickle-
minded and of fierce looks. If at a birth the Moon be in her own
or a friendly decanate. the subject would have a prepossessing
appearance and all virtues: but if she be in a decanate owned by
a non-friendly planet, he would have the appearance and qualities
pertaining to that planet. If the Moon occupies a Serpent
decanate. the subject will be wrathful: if an Armed decanate.
he will commit murderous deeds; and if a Quadraped decanate
he will have liaison with worshippable women: if a Bird decanate.
he will be a wanderer. If Saturn occupying a Kendra should
aspect the Sign represented by the decanate occupied b> Mercury,
the subject would be an artist or artisan. If the rising decanate
